channel.title: Synaptics, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Synaptics, Inc. (synaptics).

item.title: CVE-2025-11772 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Co-Installer Privilege Escalation
item.description: A carefully crafted DLL, copied to C:\ProgramData\Synaptics folder, allows a local user to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges during driver installation.

item.title: CVE-2024-9157 · 7.8 HIGH 👻 — Privilege Escalation Vulnerability in CxUIUSvc service
item.description: ** UNSUPPORTED WHEN ASSIGNED ** A privilege escalation vulnerability in CxUIUSvc64.exe and CxUIUSvc32.exe of Synaptics audio drivers allows a local authorized attacker to load a DLL in a privileged process. Out of an abundance of caution, this CVE ID…

item.title: CVE-2023-5447 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Use-After-Free in Service for Hardware Support App for Fingerprint Driver
item.description: Missing lock check in SynHsaService may create a use-after-free condition which causes abnormal termination of the service, resulting in denial of service for the Synaptics Hardware Support App.

item.title: CVE-2023-6482 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Encryption key derived from static host information
item.description: Use of encryption key derived from static information in Synaptics Fingerprint Driver allows an attacker to set up a TLS session with the fingerprint sensor and send restricted commands to the fingerprint sensor. This may allow an attacker, who has p…

item.title: CVE-2023-4936 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Synaptics-DisplayLink-privilege escalation vulnerability via a dynamic library sideloading
item.description: It is possible to sideload a compromised DLL during the installation at elevated privilege.

item.title: CVE-2021-3675 · 5.5 MEDIUM — synaTEE.signed.dll Out-Of-Bounds Heap Write
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in synaTEE.signed.dll of Synaptics Fingerprint Driver allows a local authorized attacker to overwrite a heap tag, with potential loss of confidentiality. This issue affects: Synaptics Synaptics Fingerprint Driv…
